stemHtml: Which statement is correct for an SID which is only RNAV?

options.a: The RNAV SID requires a reversionary navigation system to be carried on board.
options.b: The RNAV SID is limited to aircraft fitted with approved RNAV equipment only.
options.c: The RNAV SID provides several routes that can be flown by different aircraft.
options.d: The RNAV SID can be flown with approved ground-based radio navigation receivers only.
